approvals.title: Booking Approvals
approvals.subtitle: Review and approve student booking requests

student_pricing.title: Student Pricing Management
student_pricing.description: Set custom prices for each student. This information is private and only visible to you.
student_pricing.no_students: No students have booked with you yet. Students will appear here once they make a booking.
student_pricing.modal_description: Set a custom price for this student. This information is only visible to you.
student_pricing.notes_placeholder: Add any notes about this pricing (e.g., discount reason, special arrangement)

private_invitation.modal_description: Create a confirmed booking for a specific student based on your offline agreement
private_invitation.description_placeholder: Any specific topics or notes for this session...
private_invitation.info_1: This creates an auto-confirmed booking for the selected student
private_invitation.info_2: The student will receive an email notification immediately
private_invitation.info_3: The slot will not be visible to other students
private_invitation.info_4: No acceptance required - already agreed offline
private_invitation.list_no_invitations: No private invitations in this period
private_invitation.cancel_dialog_description: Are you sure you want to cancel this private session?
private_invitation.cancel_reason_placeholder: Let the student know why you're cancelling...
